mapper.sql: SELECT p.id, p.supplier_id, p.total_cost, p.status, p.ordered_at, p.received_at, p.note, p.created_at, s.supplier_name AS supplier FROM purchases p LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id
mapper.select: ORDER BY p.ordered_at DESC, p.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchases p LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id
AND s.supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchases (supplier_id, total_cost, status, ordered_at, note) VALUES (#{supplier_id}, #{total_cost}, 'ordered', #{ordered_at}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchases SET status = 'cancelled' WHERE id = #{id}
